sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16030" key="a)rxifu/larxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχι-φύλαρχος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῡ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n16030.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chief of the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φύλαρχοι,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:3:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
